items.title: Americans of all ages are spending less time socializing
items.summary: Data: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics . Ezra Jin, the founder of Zion Church, landed in the US on Friday evening. He was one of dozens of church members who were detained in a sweeping crackdown on Christians in October . items.title: Archaeologists uncover ancient Byzantine city in Egypt’s western desert
items.summary: Well-preserved fourth-century quarters reveal details of daily life, urban development and economic activities Archaeologists in Egypt have uncovered a well-preserved Byzantine-era city in the western desert. The fourth-century quarters had residential and religious structures, including a basilica-style church in the Dakhla oasis. Archaeologists also found coins, pottery fragments and tools.
